title: Employment Boost at Glasgow Prestwick Following E-Commerce Growth

sections.heading: Job Growth at Glasgow Prestwick Airport
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport (PIK) has observed a notable increase in employment figures linked to the expansion of the e-commerce industry. This growth reflects an upturn in operational activity at the airport, attributed directly to the rising demand for e-commerce logistics.

sections.heading: E-commerce Industry Impact
sections.content: The recent advancements in the e-commerce sector have prompted a surge in related activities at PIK, which has subsequently translated into more job opportunities. Various roles associated with logistics, handling, and support services are among those benefiting from this growth.
